nodes.name: Golden-browed warbler
nodes.summary: Golden-browed warbler（Basileuterus belli）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Golden-browed warbler。

nodes.name: Golden-browed warbler
nodes.summary: The golden-browed warbler (Basileuterus belli) is a species of bird in the family Parulidae, the New World warblers. It is found in El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, and Mexico. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. The species was described by Jacob Post Giraud, Jr. in 1841. References External links Golden-browed warbler photo gallery VIREO Photo-High Res Archived 2011-07-25 at the Wayback Machine; Article mtaudubon–"Western Mexico"
